title: Provider deny cannot override the developer-workflow floor on a clean agent commit
description: An AI agent makes a clean commit (no credential taint). A policy provider returns deny. vcs_commit is in the developer-workflow floor set, so on a clean session no advisory verdict — not even a deny — can escalate it. The provider deny is recorded as advisory input but does not block. Final: allow. The agent counterpart to opa-deny-human-commit-clean.
